initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(results.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers
JOIN results ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.forename = 'Eddie'
  AND drivers.surname = 'Irvine'
  AND races.year = 2000;
